passing_score_scale: Percentage correct (pass/fail threshold varies by country)
exam_price_notes: No separate exam fee; included in the Australian citizenship application fee. Based on the 'Australian Citizenship: Our Common Bond' study resource.
id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID or passport required at all test centers. For USCIS: applicants present at naturalization interview with required documents. For Life in the UK: photo ID required at test center.
exam_rules: No unauthorized materials, mobile phones, or notes permitted during testing. USCIS civics test is conducted orally by a USCIS officer; answers may be given in any order. Life in the UK: computer-based at approved test centers; results available immediately. Canadian citizenship test: conducted online or in-person; supervised by IRCC. Results and pass/fail status determine eligibility for the citizenship ceremony or further steps.
renewal_options: Citizenship is permanent once granted; these tests are one-time requirements as part of the application process. Test result validity period may apply: Life in the UK results valid indefinitely once passed.

prerequisites.description: Applied for Australian citizenship; met residency requirements; English language proficiency demonstrated

retake_policy.notes: USCIS: applicants who fail are retested within 60–90 days on the failed components only. Life in the UK: candidates may retake immediately; each attempt costs £50. Canadian citizenship test: IRCC will schedule a retake if needed. Australian citizenship test: retakes available at departmental discretion.

domains.name: Australia's Democratic Beliefs, Rights and Liberties
Government and the Law in Australia

official_study_resources.title: USCIS 100 Civics Questions and Answers
official_study_resources.notes: Free; includes all 100 civics questions with answers, flashcards, and audio recordings

official_study_resources.title: Discover Canada: The Rights and Responsibilities of Citizenship
official_study_resources.notes: Free online; official study guide for the Canadian Citizenship Test

official_study_resources.title: Life in the United Kingdom: A Guide for New Residents (3rd edition)
official_study_resources.notes: Official study book; available for purchase; required for Life in the UK Test preparation
